```rust
fn extract_key_points(&self, content: &str) -> Vec<String>
fn extract_code_blocks(&self, content: &str) -> Vec<CodeBlock>
fn extract_metadata(&self, content: &str, result: &SearchResult) -> ContentMetadata
fn classify_content_type(&self, url: &str, content: &str) -> ContentType

```

All content processing methods are untested. Each is pure and easily testable:
1. extract_key_points — bullet lists, numbered lists, indicator words
2. extract_code_blocks — fenced blocks with/without language, inline code fallback
3. classify_content_type — URL patterns (/docs/, /blog/, /tutorial/), content patterns
4. extract_title_from_content — markdown heading extraction
5. detect_language — English/Spanish/French keyword heuristics
6. extract_tags — tech keyword and hashtag extraction
Add tests for ContentFetcher processing methods
